subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — it's great to hear from Partner Corp, and we're definitely interested in exploring how our teams might work together.

I'd be happy to set up an introductory call this week. Could you let me know a few time slots that work for you (including your timezone)? I'll check availability on our end and confirm a time promptly.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those details directly. However, once we've had our initial call and aligned on the collaboration scope, I can facilitate an introduction to the right people on our leadership team so they can connect with your decision-makers directly.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
